No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course includes readings on 'speaking anxiety,' which minimally infers a link to mental well-being (Target 3.4) in language learners.

Quality Education.reason: The course directly focuses on improving English teaching methods, training qualified teachers (Target 4.c), and enhancing learning outcomes (Target 4.1).
evidence: effectively teaching listening and speaking skills
